mission.title: kepler:  LR Model (DynComponentModelWeight):
mission.description: LR Model (DynComponentModelWeight):. Users encounter: "model.go:87] Model Config CONTAINER_COMPONENTS: {UseEstimatorSidecar:false SelectedModel: SelectFilt".

steps.title: Identify kepler troubleshoot symptoms
steps.description:
Check for the issue in your kepler deployment:
```bash
kubectl get pods -n cert-manager -l app=kepler
kubectl logs -l app.kubernetes.io/name=kepler -n cert-manager --tail=100 | grep -i error
```
Look for error: `model.go:87] Model Config CONTAINER_COMPONENTS: {UseEstimatorSidecar:false SelectedModel: SelectFilter: InitModelURL:htt`

steps.title: Check current resource configuration
steps.description:
Inspect the relevant kepler resources:
```bash
kubectl get resource -A
kubectl describe resource <name> -n <namespace>
```
**Is your feature request related to a problem? Please describe.**
Debug with Huamin  because the metrics are nulls and the kepler model server is not applicated.
We are on airgapped environment and w

steps.title: Apply the fix for  LR Model (DynComponentModelWeight):
steps.description:
Apply the configuration change to resolve the issue:
```yaml
apiVersion: v1
data:
  BIND_ADDRESS: 0.0.0.0:9102
  CGROUP_METRICS: '*'
  CPU_ARCH_OVERRIDE: ""
  ENABLE_EBPF_CGROUPID: "true"
  ENABLE_GPU: "true"
  ENABLE_PROCESS_METRICS: "false"
  EXPOSE_CGROUP_METRICS: "true"
  EXPOSE_HW_COUNTER_METRICS: "true"
  EXPOSE_IRQ_COUNTER_METRICS: "true"
  EXPOSE_KUBELET_METRICS: "true"
  KEPLER_LOG_LEVEL: "1"
  KEPLER_NAMESPACE: kepler
  METRIC_PATH: /metrics
  MODEL_CONFIG: |
    CONTAINER_COMPONENTS_ESTIMATOR=false
   CONTAINER_COMPONENTS_INIT_URL=https://raw.githubusercontent.com/sustainable-computing-io/kepler-model-server/main/tests/test_m
```

steps.title: Confirm  LR Model (DynComponentModelWeight): is resolved
steps.description:
Verify the fix by checking that the original error no longer occurs:
```bash
kubectl logs -l app.kubernetes.io/name=kepler -n cert-manager --tail=50 --since=5m
kubectl get events -n cert-manager --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10
```
Confirm that `model.go:87] Model Config CONTAINER_COMPONENTS: {UseEstimatorSidecar:false SelectedModel: SelectFilter: InitModelURL:htt` no longer appears in logs.

resolution.summary: This issue was resolved by applying the fix from the linked PR. The root cause was identified and addressed by the community.
codeSnippets:
apiVersion: v1
data:
  BIND_ADDRESS: 0.0.0.0:9102
  CGROUP_METRICS: '*'
  CPU_ARCH_OVERRIDE: ""
  ENABLE_EBPF_CGROUPID: "true"
  ENABLE_GPU: "true"
  ENABLE_PROCESS_METRICS: "false"
  EXPOSE_CGROUP_METRICS: "true"
  EXPOSE_HW_COUNTER_METRICS: "true"
  EXPOSE_IRQ_COUNTER_METRICS: "true"

  KEPLER_LOG_LEVEL: "1"
  KEPLER_NAMESPACE: kepler
  METRIC_PATH: /metrics
  MODEL_CONFIG: |
    CONTAINER_COMPONENTS_ESTIMATOR=false
   CONTAINER_COMPONENTS_INIT_URL=https://raw.githubusercontent.com/sustainable-computing-io/kepler-model-server/main/tests/test_models/DynComponentModelWeight/CgroupOnly/ScikitMixed/ScikitMixed.json
kind: ConfigMap
metadata:
  labels:
    sustainable-computing.io/app: kepler
  name: kepler-cfm
  namespace: kepler

prerequisites.description: A running Kubernetes cluster with kepler installed or the issue environment reproducible.
